ranks.description: Icebound Fortitude Talent Requires Death Knight Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

Death Strike Talent Requires Death Knight Requires Melee Weapon Blood, Unholy Focuses dark power into a strike that deals (153.12% of Attack Power) Physical damage and heals you for (20 / Voracious : 21 / Improved Death Strike : 32 )% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0 % of maximum health. Frost Focuses dark power into a strike with both weapons, that deals a total of [(153.12% of Attack Power) + (29.835% of Attack Power)] Physical damage and heals you for (20 / Voracious : 21 / Improved Death Strike : 32 )% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0 % of maximum health.

Raise Dead Talent Requires Death Knight Raises a [ Glyph of the Geist : geist / ghoul] to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one [ Glyph of the Geist : geist / ghoul] at a time. Lasts 1 min.
Runic Attenuation Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 25 Approximately 10.8 procs per minute Auto attacks have a chance to generate .

Improved Death Strike Talent Requires Death Knight Frost, Unholy Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%. Blood Death Strike's cost is reduced by 5, and its healing is increased by 5%.

Cleaving Strikes Talent Requires Death Knight Frost Frostscythe deals 20% increased damage during Remorseless Winter. Blood Heart Strike hits up to 3 additional enemies while you remain in Death and Decay. When leaving your Death and Decay you retain its bonus effects for 4 sec. Unholy Scourge Strike and Festering Strike deal 10% increased damage.
Mind Freeze Talent Requires Death Knight Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

Blinding Sleet Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 30 Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect. When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.
Gloom Ward Talent Requires Death Knight Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.
Gloom Ward Talent Requires Death Knight Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

March of Darkness Talent Requires Death Knight Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec. [ Price of Progress : Movement speed while using Price of Progress is increased by 5% ]

Wraith Walk Talent Channeled () Requires Death Knight Requires level 40 (Blood, Frost, Unholy) Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70 % for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect. While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.
Unholy Momentum Talent Requires Death Knight Increases Haste by 2%.
Unholy Momentum Talent Requires Death Knight Increases Haste by 2%.
Control Undead Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight Dominates the target undead creature up to level 38, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.
Enfeeble Talent Requires Death Knight Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.
Coldthirst Talent Requires Death Knight Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.
Proliferating Chill Talent Requires Death Knight Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.
Permafrost Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 40 Frost, Unholy Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 30% of the damage dealt.
Veteran of the Third War Talent Requires Death Knight Frost, Unholy Stamina increased by 12%. Blood Stamina increased by 20%.

Death Pact Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 45 (Blood) Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.
Brittle Talent Requires Death Knight Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec. (Proc chance: 15%)
Blood Bond Talent Requires Death Knight While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.
Icy Talons Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 15 Your Runic Power spending abilities increase your melee attack speed by 6% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times. (500ms cooldown)
Death Notes Talent Requires Death Knight Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.
Anti-Magic Zone Talent Requires Death Knight Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec , reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.
Death Defiance Talent Requires Death Knight The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.
Unholy Bond Talent Requires Death Knight Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.
Ice Prison Talent Requires Death Knight Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.
Asphyxiate Talent Requires Death Knight Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

Death's Reach Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 30 (Frost, Unholy) Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds. Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.
Assimilation Talent Requires Death Knight The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.
Anti-Magic Barrier Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 35 Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

effects.target_spell_name: Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed

ranks.description: Grip of the Dead Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 30 (Unholy) Requires level 40 (Blood) [ Defile / Death and Decay] reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.
Suppression Talent Requires Death Knight Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.
Blood Scent Talent Requires Death Knight Increases Leech by 3%.
Unholy Endurance Talent Requires Death Knight Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.
Osmosis Talent Requires Death Knight Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.
Insidious Chill Talent Requires Death Knight Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.
Runic Protection Talent Requires Death Knight Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

Blood Draw Talent Requires Death Knight When you fall below 30% health you drain (120% of Attack Power) health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec. Can only occur every 2 min.
Rune Mastery Talent Requires Death Knight Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.
Rune Mastery Talent Requires Death Knight Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.
Subduing Grasp Talent Requires Death Knight When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.
Will of the Necropolis Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 35 Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.
Will of the Necropolis Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 35 Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

Null Magic Talent Requires Death Knight Frost, Unholy Magic damage taken is reduced by 5% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%. Blood Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.
Unyielding Will Talent Requires Death Knight Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.
Death's Echo Talent Requires Death Knight Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

Vestigial Shell Talent Requires Death Knight Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 0 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

Outbreak Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight Inflicts the target with Dread Plague and Virulent Plague. Dread Plague A malicious plague that deals (439.11% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for (184.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time. Virulent Plague An infectious plague that spreads to all nearby enemies, dealing (200.35% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 24 sec.

Vampiric Strike Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 35% chance to make your next Heart Strike become Vampiric Strike. Vampiric Strike heals you for 1% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 2.0%, up to 10.0% for 20 sec. Unholy Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next become Vampiric Strike. Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

Scourge Strike Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight An unholy strike that deals (135% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing your plagues on the target to erupt, dealing their damage an additional time at 35% effectiveness. Spreads Virulent Plague on the target to a nearby enemy.
Sudden Doom Talent Requires Death Knight Dread Plague has a 35% chance to exhilarate you, making your next Death Coil or Epidemic cost 15 less Runic Power and deal 35% increased damage.
Newly Turned Talent Requires Death Knight Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

Vampiric Speed Talent Requires Death Knight Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%. Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec. (100ms cooldown)
Blood-Soaked Ground Talent Requires Death Knight While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

Desecrate Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Death and Decay has a chance to collapse whenever it damages a diseased enemy, dealing 150% of its remaining damage instantly and granting you its bonus effects for the remaining duration. Unholy Death and Decay has a chance to collapse whenever it damages a diseased enemy, dealing 300% of its remaining damage instantly and granting you its bonus effects for the remaining duration.
Vampiric Aura Talent Requires Death Knight Your Leech is increased by 2%. While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

Bloody Fortitude Talent Requires Death Knight Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health. Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.
Thrill of Blood Talent Requires Death Knight Blood, Unholy Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 0.2% per stack.

Clawing Shadows Talent Requires Death Knight Shadows guide your strikes, increasing the damage of your Scourge Strike by 25%, and causing it to grant you Clawing Shadows up to 4 times. For each stack of Clawing Shadows, your Scourge Strike chains to an additional enemy. Each subsequent chain deals 20% reduced damage.

Putrefy Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight Summon a Lesser Ghoul to strike the enemy for (234.9% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and have them explode for (121.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

Dark Transformation Talent Requires Death Knight Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec. Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

Infliction of Sorrow Talent Requires Death Knight Blood When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your Blood Plague, it extends the duration of the disease by 3.0 sec, and deals 20% of the remaining damage to the enemy. Unholy When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and erupts them with 30% increased effectiveness.

Frenzied Bloodthirst Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 6% per stack. Unholy Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike by 3% per stack.

effects.target_spell_name: your Death Coil and Death Strike
your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike

ranks.description: The Blood is Life Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec. Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 15% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Blood Dancing Rune Weapon summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec. Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. (1s cooldown)
Visceral Strength Talent Requires Death Knight Blood When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 12% Strength for 12 sec. Unholy When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.
Foul Infections Talent Requires Death Knight Your diseases deal 10% more damage and have a 5% increased chance to critically strike.
Plague Mastery Talent Requires Death Knight Critical strike damage of your diseases is increased by 25%
Grave Mastery Talent Requires Death Knight Critical strike damage of your minions is increased by 15%
Doomed Bidding Talent Requires Death Knight Consuming Sudden Doom summons forth a Lesser Ghoul to assist you for 6 sec.

Inevitable Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Blood Plague deals up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health. Unholy Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health. Vampiric Strike grants maximum stacks of Clawing Shadows.

Incite Terror Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Vampiric Strike and cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec. Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness. Blood Vampiric Strike and Heart Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec. Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.
Pact of the San'layn Talent Requires Death Knight You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

Sanguine Scent Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health. Unholy Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

Transfusion Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Vampiric Strike increases the damage of the Lesser Ghoul it summons by 10%. Blood Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Morbidity Talent Requires Death Knight Diseased enemies take 1% increased damage from you per disease they are affected by.

Festering Scythe Talent Requires Death Knight Festering Strike now follows up with a Festering Scythe that costs no Runes. Festering Scythe Slashes through all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, dealing (101.25% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and hastening all of your Plagues on targets hit to deal damage 35% faster for 25 sec.
Superstrain Talent Requires Death Knight Dread Plague deals damage to an additional nearby enemy at 75% effectiveness and has a chance to grant you .
March of Madness Talent Requires Death Knight Your Lesser Ghouls deal 15% increased damage.
Magus of the Dead Talent Requires Death Knight Dark Transformation and Army of the Dead summon a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

Infected Claws Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 15 The infected claws of your ghouls have a chance to sicken the foe, dealing (20.79% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 12 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

Gift of the San'layn Talent Requires Death Knight Blood While Dancing Rune Weapon is active you gain Gift of the San'layn. Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Heart Strike for the duration. Unholy While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn. Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 80%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your for the duration.

effects.target_spell_name: your Heart Strike for the duration

ranks.description: Rider's Champion Talent Requires Death Knight Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec. Mograine Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage. Whitemane Casts Undeath on your target dealing (6.86532% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed. Trollbane Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec. Nazgrim While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.
Ebon Fever Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 25 Plagues deal 15% more damage over time in 75% of their duration.
Scythe of Decay Talent Requires Death Knight Festering Scythe casts a Death and Decay at the target location. Can only occur every 30 sec.
Coil of Devastation Talent Requires Death Knight Death Coil deals 10% increased damage and causes the target to take an additional 30% of the direct damage dealt over 4 sec.

Army of the Dead Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight Summons a legion of 8 empowered Lesser Ghouls that last for 15 sec [ Raise Abomination : and an Abomination ] [ Summon Gargoyle : and a Gargoyle ] to swarm your enemies. Generates .

Unholy Devotion Talent Requires Death Knight Putrefy causes your permanent Ghoul to go on an unholy frenzy, increasing its attack speed and energy regeneration by 25% for 12 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Menacing Magus Talent Requires Death Knight Your Magus of the Dead Shadow Bolt now fires a volley of Shadow Bolts at up to 8 nearby enemies.
Ghoulish Frenzy Talent Requires Death Knight Dark Transformation increases the attack speed and damage of you and your Monstrosity by 5% for 15 sec.
On a Paler Horse Talent Requires Death Knight While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

Death Charge Talent Requires Death Knight Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects. For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

Mograine's Might Talent Requires Death Knight Frost Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain 5% critical strike chance while inside Mograine's Death and Decay. Unholy Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain the benefits of your Death and Decay while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

Horsemen's Aid Talent Requires Death Knight While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness. You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.
Pact of the Apocalypse Talent Requires Death Knight When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.
Ride or Die! Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec. Frost Pillar of Frost summons forth Trollbane for 6 sec.
Blightfall Talent Requires Death Knight All diseases deal 5% increased damage.

Harbinger of Doom Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 35 Sudden Doom triggers 30% more often and can accumulate up to 2 charges. Summoning a Lesser Ghoul with Scourge Strike reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 2.5 sec. (300ms cooldown)

Raise Abomination Talent Requires Death Knight Army of the Dead now raises an Abomination that attacks enemies while emitting a disease cloud that lasts for 30 sec. Enemies within the disease cloud take 10% increased damage from your minions.

Summon Gargoyle Talent Requires Death Knight Army of the Dead now summons a Gargoyle into the battlefield to bombard your enemies for 25 sec. The Gargoyle gains 1% increased damage for every you spend and always critically strikes.
Putrid Echoes Talent Requires Death Knight Putrefy deals 20% increased damage and has 1 additional charge.

All Will Serve Talent Requires Death Knight Requires level 15 Raise Dead summons an additional skeletal archer at your command that shoots Blighted Arrows. Blighted Arrow An unholy arrow that deals (34% of Attack Power) Shadow damage. When consuming Sudden Doom, your Death Coil commands your archer to fire an additional Blighted Arrow at 80 % effectiveness. Epidemic will instead cause Blighted Arrow to ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets.

Whitemane's Famine Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy When damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy. Frost When Obliterate or Frostscythe damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

Nazgrim's Conquest Talent Requires Death Knight If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%. Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.

Trollbane's Icy Fury Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Frost Obliterate and Frostscythe shatter Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Let Terror Reign Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness. Frost Casting Obliterate or Frostscythe orders Trollbane to cast his Obliterate or Frostscythe alongside you at 100% effectiveness. (500ms cooldown)

Blightburst Talent Requires Death Knight The explosion effect of Putrefy extends the duration of your plagues by 4.0 sec and deals 35% of the damage they would deal over that time instantly. Putrefy now applies your plagues to unaffected targets.

Soul Reaper Talent 1 Rune / - Requires Death Knight Requires level 35 Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing (450% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec. Consumes all available charges to cast Putrefy. Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Necromancer's Cunning Talent Requires Death Knight When your Lesser Ghouls expire, they explode in viscera, dealing [0.21 * ((200% of Attack Power)) * (1 + Versatility) * 1 ] Shadow damage to enemies nearby.
Hungering Thirst Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%. Frost The damage of your diseases and Frost Strike are increased by 5%.
Fury of the Horsemen Talent Requires Death Knight Every you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

A Feast of Souls Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Runic Power spending abilities deal 20% increased damage. Frost While you have 8 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Runic Power spending abilities deal 10% increased damage.

Mawsworn Menace Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy % increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec. Frost Obliterate deals 5% increased damage and your Remorseless Winter lasts 2 sec longer.
Unholy Armaments Talent Requires Death Knight The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage.
Scourging Talent Requires Death Knight Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at 50% effectiveness. Clawing Shadows can now stack 1 additional times.
Scourging Talent Requires Death Knight Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at 50% effectiveness. Clawing Shadows can now stack 1 additional times.
Ancient Power Talent Requires Death Knight Spending Runic Power increases your Strength by 0.50% for 20 sec. Multiple applications may overlap. (100ms cooldown)
Ancient Power Talent Requires Death Knight Spending Runic Power increases your Strength by 0.50% for 20 sec. Multiple applications may overlap. (100ms cooldown)

Reaping Talent Requires Death Knight Scourge Strike, Festering Strike, and Death Coil deal 30% additional damage to enemies below 35% health. Dark Transformation resets Soul Reaper's cooldown and allows it to be used on any target. (300ms cooldown)
Unholy Aura Talent Requires Death Knight Each Magus of the Dead under your command grants you 1.0% Haste.
Unholy Aura Talent Requires Death Knight Each Magus of the Dead under your command grants you 1.0% Haste.

Commander of the Dead Talent Requires Death Knight Dark Transformation empowers your [ Dark Arbiter / Gargoyle], Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 25%. The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 0% of your Mastery.

Commander of the Dead Talent Requires Death Knight Dark Transformation empowers your [ Dark Arbiter / Gargoyle], Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 25%. The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 0% of your Mastery.
Apocalypse Now Talent Requires Death Knight Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec. (1s cooldown)

Pestilence Talent Requires Death Knight Dark Transformation upgrades your next Outbreak to Pestilence. Pestilence Consume 100% of your Plagues around you and deal 100% of their remaining damage instantly, and gain a charge of Putrefy.

Reanimation Talent Requires Death Knight When you Putrefy a Lesser Ghoul, it has a 100% chance to reanimate as a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec. Magus of the Dead Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts deal 25% increased damage.

Outnumber Talent Requires Death Knight Each Lesser Ghoul increases the damage of your permanent Ghoul by 10%, and Dark Transformation additionally empowers the Claw attacks of your Lesser Ghouls to Sweeping Claws. Sweeping Claws Rakes an enemy with deformed claws, dealing  [(Attack Power * 0.2484) * (1 + Versatility) * 2 * 1.144] Shadow damage to the target and  [(Attack Power * 0.17155125) * (1 + Versatility) * 2 * 1.144] Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

Forbidden Knowledge Talent Requires Death Knight Army of the Dead siphons the power of the fallen, transforming Death Coil and Epidemic into Necrotic Coil and Graveyard for 30 sec. Necrotic Coil Unleash vortex of necrotic energy and bone, dealing (219.375% of Attack Power) Shadowstrike damage up to 3 foes and (69% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all pierced enemies. Graveyard The dead erupt beneath all foes with Virulent Plague, dealing (112.315% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and (44.9266% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

Infliction of Sorrow Talent Requires Death Knight Blood When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your Blood Plague, it extends the duration of the disease by 3.0 sec, and deals 20% of the remaining damage to the enemy. Unholy When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and erupts them with 30% increased effectiveness.

Incite Terror Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Vampiric Strike and cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec. Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness. Blood Vampiric Strike and Heart Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec. Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

Inevitable Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Blood Plague deals up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health. Unholy Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health. Vampiric Strike grants maximum stacks of Clawing Shadows.

The Blood is Life Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec. Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 15% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Blood Dancing Rune Weapon summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec. Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. (1s cooldown)
Blood-Soaked Ground Talent Requires Death Knight While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

Desecrate Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Death and Decay has a chance to collapse whenever it damages a diseased enemy, dealing 150% of its remaining damage instantly and granting you its bonus effects for the remaining duration. Unholy Death and Decay has a chance to collapse whenever it damages a diseased enemy, dealing 300% of its remaining damage instantly and granting you its bonus effects for the remaining duration.

Vampiric Strike Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 35% chance to make your next Heart Strike become Vampiric Strike. Vampiric Strike heals you for 1% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 2.0%, up to 10.0% for 20 sec. Unholy Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next become Vampiric Strike. Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

Gift of the San'layn Talent Requires Death Knight Blood While Dancing Rune Weapon is active you gain Gift of the San'layn. Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Heart Strike for the duration. Unholy While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn. Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 80%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your for the duration.

effects.target_spell_name: your Heart Strike for the duration

ranks.description: Pact of the San'layn Talent Requires Death Knight You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

Sanguine Scent Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health. Unholy Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.
Vampiric Aura Talent Requires Death Knight Your Leech is increased by 2%. While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

Bloody Fortitude Talent Requires Death Knight Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health. Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.
Newly Turned Talent Requires Death Knight Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

Vampiric Speed Talent Requires Death Knight Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%. Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec. (100ms cooldown)

Frenzied Bloodthirst Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 6% per stack. Unholy Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike by 3% per stack.

effects.target_spell_name: your Death Coil and Death Strike
your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike

ranks.description: Transfusion Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Vampiric Strike increases the damage of the Lesser Ghoul it summons by 10%. Blood Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Thrill of Blood Talent Requires Death Knight Blood, Unholy Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 0.2% per stack.
Visceral Strength Talent Requires Death Knight Blood When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 12% Strength for 12 sec. Unholy When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

Horsemen's Aid Talent Requires Death Knight While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness. You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.
Pact of the Apocalypse Talent Requires Death Knight When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.
Apocalypse Now Talent Requires Death Knight Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec. (1s cooldown)
Fury of the Horsemen Talent Requires Death Knight Every you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

A Feast of Souls Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Runic Power spending abilities deal 20% increased damage. Frost While you have 8 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Runic Power spending abilities deal 10% increased damage.
Hungering Thirst Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%. Frost The damage of your diseases and Frost Strike are increased by 5%.

Whitemane's Famine Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy When damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy. Frost When Obliterate or Frostscythe damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

Mawsworn Menace Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy % increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec. Frost Obliterate deals 5% increased damage and your Remorseless Winter lasts 2 sec longer.

Nazgrim's Conquest Talent Requires Death Knight If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%. Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.
On a Paler Horse Talent Requires Death Knight While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

Death Charge Talent Requires Death Knight Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects. For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

Trollbane's Icy Fury Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Frost Obliterate and Frostscythe shatter Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Rider's Champion Talent Requires Death Knight Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec. Mograine Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage. Whitemane Casts Undeath on your target dealing (6.86532% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed. Trollbane Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec. Nazgrim While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

Mograine's Might Talent Requires Death Knight Frost Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain 5% critical strike chance while inside Mograine's Death and Decay. Unholy Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain the benefits of your Death and Decay while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.
Unholy Armaments Talent Requires Death Knight The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage.

Let Terror Reign Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness. Frost Casting Obliterate or Frostscythe orders Trollbane to cast his Obliterate or Frostscythe alongside you at 100% effectiveness. (500ms cooldown)
Ride or Die! Talent Requires Death Knight Unholy Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec. Frost Pillar of Frost summons forth Trollbane for 6 sec.

Swift and Painful Talent Requires Death Knight Blood If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 10% Strength for 8 sec. Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark. Frost If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 8% Strength for 8 sec. Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

Grim Reaper Talent Requires Death Knight Reaper's Mark initial strike grants [3 charges of Bone Shield][Killing Machine]. Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to 30% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

Pact of the Deathbringer Talent Requires Death Knight When you suffer a damaging effect equal to 25% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at 50% effectiveness. May only occur every 2 min. When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by 5 sec.

Rune Carved Plates Talent Requires Death Knight Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by 1.5% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by 1.5% for 5 sec, up to 5 times.

Wave of Souls Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing (211.92% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path. Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back. Frost Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing (96.7079% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path. Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

Bind in Darkness Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Blood Boil deals 30% increased damage, and is now Shadowfrost. Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike. Frost Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 60% increased damage to its main target, and is now Shadowfrost. Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.
Death's Messenger Talent Requires Death Knight Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by 30 sec.
Expelling Shield Talent Requires Death Knight When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by 10% for 6 sec.

Dark Talons Talent Requires Death Knight Frost Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec. Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active. Blood Marrowrend and Heart Strike have a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec. Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active. (1s cooldown)

Reaper's Onslaught Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Marrowrends empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1. Frost Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Obliterates and Frostscythes empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

Wither Away Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Blood Plague deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Blood Plague. Frost Frost Fever deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Frost Fever.

Soul Rupture Talent Requires Death Knight Blood When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 10% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies. Frost When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 20% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

Reaper's Mark Talent 2 Runes Requires Death Knight Frost Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (312% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark. Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (40.4853% of Attack Power) damage per stack. Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies. Blood Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (368.55% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark. Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (45.348% of Attack Power) damage per stack. Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

Exterminate Talent Requires Death Knight Blood After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Marrowrends cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies. The first scythe strikes your target for (858.54% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for (469.2% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage [and applies Frost Fever]. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Frost After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Obliterates or Frostscythes summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies. The first scythe strikes your target for (530.368% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and has a 100% chance to grant Killing Machine, the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for (214.468% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage [and applies Frost Fever]. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. (1s cooldown)

Echoing Fury Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage. Casting Dancing Rune Weapon grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness. Frost Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage. Casting Frostwyrm's Fury grants 2 stacks of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

Deathly Blows Talent Requires Death Knight Blood Death Strike damage increased by 12%. Frost Frost Strike damage is increased by 15% and Glacial Advance damage is increased by 5%. Reaper's Mark grants 3 charges of Bonegrinder if it is known. (500ms cooldown)

Frigid Resolve Talent Requires Death Knight Blood The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 100% and Exterminate grants Permafrost equal to 10% of the damage dealt. Permafrost Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt. Frost The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 50%. Permafrost Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.
